_comment: Copy this to ~/.config/ai-usage-bar/config.json and fill in. Never commit your real config or token files.

claude._note: Preferred: put the OAuth token in ~/.config/ai-usage-bar/claude-oauth.token (chmod 600). Get one with `claude setup-token`. The plugin reads 5h/weekly % from anthropic-ratelimit-unified-* response headers on a tiny messages call (needs only user:inference scope). 'oauth_token' below is an optional fallback.
claude.label: Max 20x

ollama_cloud._note: Live Session/Weekly usage is scraped from the logged-in ollama.com/settings page using your Chrome session cookie (no public usage API exists). Stay logged into ollama.com in Chrome.
